svg.title: Becoming AI-Augmented Full Cover Composition Template - adjusted
svg.desc: Full wrap SVG composition template for a 6x9 book cover, 322 pages. Includes back cover, spine, and front cover groups, plus image placeholder groups and text overlay groups for title, subtitle, author, back cover copy, and spine text.

g.text: Expanding Human Capability in the Age of AI
But tools alone do not create leverage.

text.tspan: Becoming AI-Augmented is a practical guide for professionals
who want to pair real expertise with AI fluency.
Learn how to move from underleveraged execution to
high-trust, high-impact outcomes in your daily work.
Build systems for thinking, deciding, and communicating
so AI expands your influence instead of diluting it.
- Assess your current AI posture by task and domain
- Build AI experience without the AI Faker trap
- Deepen subject matter expertise with AI learning loops
- Strengthen communication, clarity, and decision quality
- Develop judgment, humility, and learning velocity
For leaders and professionals who want to accelerate
their careers by becoming consistently AI-augmented.
Dr. Darren Pulsipher is a digital transformation leader, author,
and host of the Embracing Digital Transformation podcast,
reaching over 200,000 subscribers and more than one million
monthly listeners.
He is the creator of the AI-Augmented Operating System (AAOS),
a framework for turning AI into reliable, scalable work.
Becoming
AI-Augmented
Expanding Human Capability
in the Age of AI
